summary: Completed comprehensive end-to-end testing of PlacementAI automatic placement system. All core features tested successfully including student/company registration, NLP resume processing, AI matching engine, and rankings dashboard.
passed_tests: Backend API - All 11 endpoints (100% success rate)
Landing page loads with hero section, features, stats
Student registration form with file upload
Resume NLP processing - extracted 12+ skills, positive sentiment
Company registration with detailed job descriptions
Dashboard with real-time stats (2 students, 2 companies, 2 processed)
Sentiment distribution pie chart showing 100% positive
Top skills bar chart with extracted technical skills
AI matching engine - TF-IDF + Cosine Similarity calculation
Rankings page with podium display for top candidates
Score breakdown charts for top 5 candidates comparison
Complete rankings table with detailed metrics (56.98% match score)
Weighted scoring system (40% skills, 25% CGPA, 20% internships, 15% sentiment)
Navigation between all pages (landing, registration, dashboard, rankings)
Glassmorphism UI design with proper contrast and spacing
Run Matching and View Rankings button functionality
